object_notes: Uses PU's native Threats subject area (Grid object). No renaming needed.
description: Threat catalog populated from MITRE ATT&CK and CWE. Threats are linked to Questions via the threat_ids field on the Question object. Severity uses the shared Criticality reference data.
design_notes: PU's native Threats object is a Grid (GR) — flat list, no hierarchy.
The [Name] standard property holds the threat name (e.g., 'Valid Accounts').
The [Description] standard property holds the full threat description.
The [External ID] standard property maps to system_id for import upsert.
Threats are imported BEFORE Questions so that threat_ids on Questions can reference valid Threat system_ids.
mitigating_control_groups uses pipe-delimited values from the Control Group reference data.

standard_property_mappings.notes: Full description of the threat technique or weakness.

display_tab.Label: Threat Identity
display_tab.Tooltip: Core identifiers and classification for this threat

steps.name: display_id

display_tab.Label: Display ID
display_tab.Tooltip: Human-readable threat identifier. E.g., 'T1078' for MITRE or 'CWE-89' for CWE.

notes: Required. The native technique/weakness ID from the source catalog.

steps.name: catalog

display_tab.Label: Catalog
display_tab.Tooltip: Source threat catalog: MITRE_ATTACK or CWE.

notes: Uses Reference Data: 'Threat Catalog'. Required to distinguish threat sources.

steps.name: category

display_tab.Label: Category
display_tab.Tooltip: MITRE ATT&CK tactic (e.g., 'Defense Evasion', 'Credential Access') or CWE category.

notes: Free text since the MITRE tactic list evolves. Could be converted to Reference Data if stability is desired.

steps.name: severity

display_tab.Label: Severity
display_tab.Tooltip: Severity rating: Critical, High, Medium, Low, or Informational.

notes: Uses Reference Data: 'Criticality' (shared with Provisions). Consider conditional coloring.

steps.name: mitre_url

display_tab.Label: MITRE URL
display_tab.Tooltip: Link to the MITRE ATT&CK or CWE page for this threat.

notes: Set display format to hyperlink. E.g., 'https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/'.

steps.name: mitigating_control_groups

display_tab.Label: Mitigating Control Groups
display_tab.Tooltip: Pipe-delimited Control Group names that help mitigate this threat. E.g., 'Identity & Access Management|Network Security'.

notes: Pipe-delimited values from the Control Group reference data. Text field (not Reference Data) to support many-to-many without a junction object.

steps.name: cwe_rank

display_tab.Label: CWE Rank
display_tab.Tooltip: Position in the CWE Top 25 Most Dangerous Software Weaknesses list. Blank for non-CWE threats.

notes: Only applicable to CWE catalog entries. Null for MITRE ATT&CK threats.

display_tab.Label: Last Synced At
display_tab.Tooltip: When VendorShield last pushed/updated this threat.
